title: Toy-Model Numeric Workspace
purpose: Bridge an external toy-model numeric workspace into AITP L2 without treating the workspace tree as canonical truth.
Seed method, workflow, validation_pattern, and warning_note candidates from explicit model notes, configs, and small result bundles.
artifact_granularity: One toy-model run note, together with one explicit config file and one small result bundle, is the atomic reusable backend artifact.
retrieval_hints: Prefer exact model definitions, boundary conditions, sector choices, and config files before asking for new prose summaries.
When a toy-model result materially shapes L1, L3, or L4, register the concrete run note into L0 first.
Do not over-transfer a finite-size toy-model signal to the full theory; write the scope and limits explicitly during L2 promotion.
notes: This is a public example card for external toy-model numeric workspaces such as small-system exact diagonalization folders, reduced-model notebooks, or finite-size benchmark collections.
